name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate categorization causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated categorization instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate categorization of procurement spend leading to cash flow gaps.
